violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

A rack was observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Raw animal foods (such as egg) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cookies and other dry ingredients) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC rearranged fridge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 07/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of yellow orange debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Various snack bites packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name and address. PIC removed items from self-service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back of building, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. PIC relocated item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the protein power shelves and fridge/freezer unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The ceiling in the food prep and 3 bay sink areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

The wall behind the mop sink is constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures along the wall of the 3 bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025
